summary: Iteration 97 - Frontend UI testing for Agent Terrain menu simplification. All tests PASSED. Agent Home tab correctly shows only 3 menu items. Plus tab correctly excludes 'Verification Parcelles'. Farmer Plus tab progression badge working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI changes verified: 1) Agent Home tab has exactly 3 menu items (Mes Planteurs, Inscrire un Planteur, Pratiques Durables), 2) SSRTE/Declaration Parcelles/Rechercher Planteur NOT in Home menu, 3) Plus tab has 6 items (Tableau SSRTE, Photos Geolocalisees, Pratiques Durables, Rechercher Planteur, Mon Profil, Notifications), 4) 'Verification Parcelles' NOT in Plus tab, 5) All 5 tabs work, 6) Inscrire form works without 'Erreur reseau', 7) Farmer Plus tab has progression badge with percentage and etapes count.
